title: 'azal #0235
definition:
1) to go, to go away, to go about
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go away
        1a2) to go about
        1a3) to be used up, be exhausted, be gone, evaporated
    1b) (Pual) to go to and fro
nasbUsage:
